runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th on April 11 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Infra Terra beaten 2 lengths (25.84) in a Mix 5. Leading contender.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 520m at this track clocking 30.09. Found one better last time. Well placed and worth following up.

runners.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last five starts. Last time out finished 3rd on April 11 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Infra Terra beaten 2 lengths (25.83) in a Mix 5. Not up to this.
